title: Refinedstorage Linker
description: A convenient utility curio that lets you instantly store items from any chest into your Refined Storage network with a single click.
body:
中文简介：
一个便捷的功能性饰品，让你可以一键将箱子中的物品存入精致存储网络。
• 佩戴在护符栏后，所有箱子界面顶部会显示"放入存储网络"按钮
• 支持Shift+右键绑定指定控制器，实现无限距离操作
• 自动检测附近32格内的控制器（未绑定时）
• 支持所有类型的箱子和容器

English Description:
A convenient utility curio that allows you to instantly store items from any chest into your Refined Storage network.
• Automatically adds a "Store to Network" button to all chest GUIs when equipped in the Charm slot
• Supports Shift+Right-click binding to a specific controller for unlimited range operation
• Auto-detects controllers within 32 blocks (when not bound)
• Compatible with all chest and container types
